spec.title: Tailscale2OTel — Overview
spec.description: Comprehensive tailscale2otel observability — fleet, network flows (rollup + raw), events & logs, policy/config, node metrics, and exporter diagnostics. Dynamic: sections appear only when their data is present in the target. Generated by deploy/grafana/gen/build.py.

spec.name: log_event
spec.label: Log event
spec.query: All : .+, audit : tailscale.config.audit, flow : tailscale.network.flow, posture : tailscale.device.posture, key expiring : tailscale.key.expiring, webhook : tailscale.webhook.*

spec.title: Devices online
spec.description: Devices currently reporting online.

spec.title: Offline
spec.description: Devices currently offline (normal for laptops/phones).

spec.expr: sum(max by (tailscale_user_role, tailscale_user_status, tailscale_user_type) (last_over_time(tailscale_users_count_ratio[2h]))) or vector(0)

spec.title: Device keys ≤7d
spec.description: Device node keys expiring within 7 days.

spec.title: ACL changed
spec.description: Time since the ACL policy last changed.

spec.title: Flow logging
spec.description: Tailnet network-flow-logging feature state.

spec.title: Collectors OK
spec.description: Collectors whose last scrape succeeded. Failures show as Scrape errors/s and on the Diagnostics tab.

spec.title: Active series (max)
spec.description: Largest per-metric active series count (cap is 10k).

spec.title: Enrich cache devices
spec.description: Devices held in the IP/nodeID→name enrichment cache.

spec.title: Network throughput
spec.description: Total flow throughput (rollup if present, else raw).

spec.title: Tailnet features
spec.description: Per-feature enabled (1) / disabled (0).

spec.title: Tailnets observed
spec.description: Number of distinct tailnets observed by this exporter instance.

spec.expr: count(count by (tailscale_tailnet) (target_info{service_name="tailscale2otel", tailscale_tailnet!="", tailscale_tailnet!="-"})) or vector(1)

spec.title: Tailnets
spec.description: Per-tailnet series count from target_info.

spec.title: Providers
spec.description: Control-plane provider (tailscale, headscale) for each instance.

spec.title: Devices per tailnet
spec.description: Device count per tailnet (online devices visible to the exporter).

spec.title: API p95 latency
spec.description: 95th-percentile Tailscale API request latency.

spec.title: Export p99 latency
spec.description: 99th-percentile OTLP export duration.

spec.title: Scrape budget (max)
spec.description: Worst-case fraction of scrape budget consumed across all collectors.

spec.title: Series headroom
spec.description: Fraction of the per-metric series limit consumed (0 = plenty of headroom).

spec.expr: max(tailscale2otel_series_active) / on() group_left() tailscale2otel_series_limit or vector(0)

spec.title: Export cost (DPM + log rec/s)
spec.description: Telemetry export volume — datapoints/s and log records/s going to the OTLP backend.

spec.title: Unrestricted ACL rules
spec.description: Total ACL rules that grant unrestricted access (wildcard src/dst). Any non-zero value warrants review.

spec.title: Auto-approved exit nodes
spec.description: ACL auto-approver entries for exit-node routes. Review whether automatic exit-node approval is intended.

spec.title: Unapproved subnet routes
spec.description: Subnet routes advertised but not yet approved by an admin.

spec.title: Untagged devices
spec.description: Devices not associated with any ACL tag — harder to audit and apply granular policies to.

spec.title: Pending exit-node shares
spec.description: Pending device share invitations that grant exit-node access.

spec.title: SSH wildcard enabled
spec.description: Whether the tailnet ACL contains a wildcard SSH rule.

spec.title: Devices by tag
spec.description: Device count per ACL tag combination (untagged devices group under an empty bar). Requires the tailscale.tags label (exporter >= this release).

spec.title: Untagged
spec.description: Devices not associated with any ACL tag.

spec.title: Ephemeral
spec.description: Ephemeral devices currently registered.

spec.title: Outdated (≥N behind)
spec.description: Devices running a client version that is at least one minor release behind the fleet latest.

spec.title: Latest stable
spec.description: The latest stable Tailscale client version seen in this fleet.

spec.title: Clients by version
spec.description: Fleet distribution by Tailscale client version.

spec.title: Fleet tags (rollup)
spec.description: Device count per ACL tag across the fleet.

spec.title: Keys already expired
spec.description: Devices whose node key has already expired (le=0 bucket).

spec.title: Median days-to-expiry
spec.description: Median days until device key expiry across the fleet.

spec.title: Devices by days-to-expiry bucket
spec.description: Histogram of devices bucketed by days until key expiry.

spec.title: Direct-capable %
spec.description: Fraction of devices capable of direct (non-relay) connections.

spec.title: Hard-NAT %
spec.description: Fraction of devices behind hard NAT (require relay for inbound connections).

spec.title: Client capability support
spec.description: Number of devices supporting each connectivity capability.

spec.title: NAT → relay pressure
spec.description: Correlation between hard-NAT fraction and relay endpoint count over time.

spec.title: Needs relay (hard-NAT)
spec.description: Devices behind hard NAT that require relay for inbound peer connections.

spec.title: Exit nodes advertised
spec.description: Exit nodes currently in the 'advertised' state.

spec.title: Exit nodes enabled
spec.description: Exit nodes currently in the 'enabled' state.

spec.title: Unapproved subnet routes
spec.description: Subnet routes advertised but not yet approved by an admin.

spec.title: Exit-node inventory
spec.description: Devices currently advertising or acting as exit nodes.

spec.title: Subnet-route redundancy by CIDR
spec.description: Number of routers advertising each subnet CIDR (redundancy indicator).

spec.title: Most-behind devices (top-N)
spec.description: Devices furthest behind the fleet's latest version (top-N by minor version gap).

spec.title: Exporter update available
spec.description: Whether a newer version of the tailscale2otel exporter is available.

spec.title: Updates available
spec.description: Devices with a client update available.

spec.title: Device key expiry (time until)
spec.description: Time until each device node key expires.

spec.expr: max without (service_version) (last_over_time(tailscale_device_key_expiry_seconds{os_type=~"$os_type", host_name=~"$host_name", tailscale_user=~"$device_user", tailscale_tags=~"$device_tag"}[2h])) - time()

spec.title: Last seen (time since)
spec.description: Time since each device was last seen.

spec.expr: time() - max without (service_version) (last_over_time(tailscale_device_last_seen_seconds{os_type=~"$os_type", host_name=~"$host_name", tailscale_user=~"$device_user", tailscale_tags=~"$device_tag"}[2h]))

spec.title: Posture overview
spec.description: Per-device posture: OS, client version, auto-update, encryption, track.

spec.expr: topk($topn, sum by (tailscale_src_node, tailscale_dst_node) (rate({service_name="tailscale2otel"} | event_name=`tailscale.network.flow` | unwrap tailscale_tx_bytes [$__rate_interval])))

spec.title: __other__ rollup share
spec.description: Fraction of rollup bytes folded into the bounded __other__ bucket.

spec.title: Unique dst peers per src
spec.description: Distinct destination peers per source node (last flush).

spec.title: Unique dst ports per src
spec.description: Distinct destination ports per source node (last flush).

spec.title: Log stream — $log_event
spec.description: Pick an event type with the Log event variable; filter with Log filter.

spec.title: Streams configured
spec.description: Configuration/network log streams delivering to a SIEM sink.

spec.title: Last delivery error
spec.description: 1 if any stream's last delivery reported an error (see the Delivery errors log).

spec.title: Failed requests/s by type
spec.description: Failed delivery requests to the sink — alert on a sustained rate.

spec.title: Backpressure: spoofed & max-body/s
spec.description: Entries rejected as spoofed and requests that hit the max body size (SIEM backpressure).

spec.title: Last activity age by type
spec.description: Time since the most recent delivery activity per log type (alert on staleness).

spec.title: Delivery errors
spec.description: Per-stream delivery errors; the error text is the log body.

spec.title: Failed changes — WARN (range)
spec.description: Audit events emitted at WARN (the event carried an error).

spec.title: Recent configuration changes
spec.description: Live audit stream; filter with the Log filter variable.

spec.title: Wildcard rules
spec.description: Number of ACL rules containing wildcards, by section and position.

spec.title: Unrestricted rules (grants)
spec.description: Grant rules with no destination restriction.

spec.title: Unrestricted rules (acls)
spec.description: ACL rules with no destination restriction.

spec.title: SSH wildcard
spec.description: Whether any SSH rule uses a wildcard source or destination.

spec.title: Auto-approvers by kind
spec.description: Count of auto-approver entries by kind (routes/exit-nodes).

spec.title: Posture-gated rules
spec.description: Rules that require a passing device-posture check, by section.

spec.title: Security/lifecycle changes/s
spec.description: Rate of audit change events by change kind and action.

spec.title: Device churn
spec.description: Device add/remove/update rate over time.

spec.title: Changes by actor type
spec.description: Total change events in the selected range, broken out by actor type (user/api-key/etc).

spec.title: Device shares: pending vs accepted
spec.description: Count of device share invites grouped by accepted status.

spec.title: Exit-node-granting shares
spec.description: Device share invites that also grant exit-node access.

spec.title: Multi-use shares
spec.description: Device share invites that can be reused more than once.

spec.title: Encryption coverage
spec.description: Average encryption coverage across devices (Intune isEncrypted attribute).

spec.title: Compliance distribution
spec.description: Distribution of attribute values for the selected posture attribute.

spec.title: Devices failing posture attr
spec.description: Devices with a failing (0) posture attribute. Hidden when host-name redaction is active.

spec.title: Audit: metric vs log
spec.description: Metric change counters vs Loki log event rate — divergence indicates missing ingestion path.

spec.title: Audit action breakdown (logs)
spec.description: Audit log action/target-type breakdown — no actor identity, safe to show when PII redaction is active.

spec.title: Device posture snapshot
spec.description: Per-device posture log stream (host identity in body — hidden when host-name redaction is active).

spec.title: Auto-update coverage
spec.description: Fraction of devices with Tailscale client auto-update enabled.

spec.title: State-encryption coverage
spec.description: Fraction of devices reporting an encrypted local state store.

spec.title: Integrations configured
spec.description: Configured device-posture (MDM/EDR) integrations, e.g. Intune.

spec.title: Devices matched by integration
spec.description: Devices matched to a provider host by each posture integration.

spec.title: Oldest sync age
spec.description: Time since the least-recently-synced integration last synced (alert on staleness).

spec.title: Posture match rate
spec.description: Fraction of possible-match devices that were actually matched by the integration.

spec.title: Integration sync detail
spec.description: Per integration: matched / possible-match / provider-host counts and sync age.

spec.title: Tailnet-lock errors
spec.description: Devices with a non-empty tailnet-lock error (e.g. an unsigned node). >0 means a signing node must sign the affected keys.

spec.title: Nodes with tailnet-lock errors
spec.description: Per-device tailnet-lock error events; the error text is the log body.

spec.title: Contact needs verification
spec.description: Whether any tailnet contact address requires re-verification (admin/security/billing).

spec.title: Resolvers
spec.description: DNS resolver configuration. FIX-3: no domain label on live wire.

spec.title: Tailnet settings
spec.description: Per-setting enabled (1) / disabled (0).

spec.title: Tailnet features
spec.description: Per-feature enabled (1) / disabled (0).

spec.title: External-tailnets role
spec.description: Role granted to users joining from external tailnets. Values: none / member / admin. Live: role=none.

spec.title: Per-user detail
spec.description: Per-user connected / device count / time since last seen.

spec.title: Key expiry (time until)
spec.description: Time until each API/auth key expires.

spec.title: Credential scopes (top-N)
spec.description: Top-N keys by scope count. Excludes raw key ID.

spec.title: Key scope inventory (logs)
spec.description: Credential scope values observed in key.scopes log events.

spec.title: Services (VIP)
spec.description: Tailscale Services (VIP services) advertised in the tailnet.

spec.title: Port rules per service
spec.description: Port rules exposed by each Service. Gated by cardinality.per_entity.service.

spec.title: Backing hosts by service
spec.description: Backing-host count per Service, bucketed by approval + configured state. Gated by collect_hosts + cardinality.per_entity.service.

spec.title: VIP service health
spec.description: Merged view: hosts + port-rule count per VIP service. Services with 1 host have no HA. Requires collect_hosts + per_entity.service.

spec.title: Node up
spec.description: Per-target scrape health (1=up).

spec.title: Outbound dropped packets/s by node
spec.description: Outbound packets dropped by tailscaled per node — a connectivity-degradation signal.

spec.title: Health messages
spec.description: tailscaled self-reported health warnings.

spec.title: % traffic via DERP relay by node
spec.description: Fraction of each node's traffic relayed via DERP rather than sent direct. Sustained high values indicate NAT-traversal problems (added latency).

spec.title: Throughput by path
spec.description: Total tailnet throughput split by path: DERP relay vs direct IPv4 vs direct IPv6.

spec.title: Fleet DERP share (now)
spec.description: Fleet-wide fraction of bytes relayed via DERP.

spec.title: Best latency per DERP region
spec.description: Best (minimum) device→DERP-region latency across the tailnet, per region.

spec.title: Devices per DERP region
spec.description: Number of devices reporting latency to each DERP region.

spec.title: Preferred DERP region distribution
spec.description: Number of devices that prefer each DERP region.

spec.title: Tailnets observed
spec.description: Number of distinct tailnets observed by this exporter instance (excluding placeholder '-').

spec.title: Tailnet scorecard
spec.description: Per-tailnet health scorecard: online device count, worst scrape staleness, and API error rate.

spec.expr: sum by (tailscale_tailnet) ((tailscale_device_online_ratio == 1) * on(job,instance) group_left(tailscale_tailnet) target_info{service_name="tailscale2otel", tailscale_tailnet!="", tailscale_tailnet!="-"})

max by (tailscale_tailnet) (tailscale2otel_scrape_staleness_seconds * on(job,instance) group_left(tailscale_tailnet) target_info{service_name="tailscale2otel", tailscale_tailnet!="", tailscale_tailnet!="-"})

sum by (tailscale_tailnet) (rate(tailscale2otel_api_requests_total{http_response_status_code=~"4..|5.."}[$__rate_interval]) * on(job,instance) group_left(tailscale_tailnet) target_info{service_name="tailscale2otel", tailscale_tailnet!="", tailscale_tailnet!="-"})

spec.title: Per-tailnet online devices over time
spec.description: Count of online devices per tailnet over time.

spec.expr: sum by (tailscale_tailnet) ((tailscale_device_online_ratio == 1) * on(job,instance) group_left(tailscale_tailnet) target_info{service_name="tailscale2otel", tailscale_tailnet!="", tailscale_tailnet!="-"})

spec.title: Build info
spec.description: Version / Go version (labels).

spec.title: Last scrape age
spec.description: Seconds since each collector's last scrape.

spec.title: Active series by metric (top $topn)
spec.description: Per-metric active series (cap 10k). Watch the flow families.

spec.title: Memory breakdown
spec.description: Go memory obtained from the OS (runtime.memory.sys), stacked into in-use heap, idle/reserved heap, stacks, and other non-heap runtime (GC, mspan/mcache). Total height = total sys.

spec.title: GC next-target vs live heap
spec.description: Live heap vs the heap size that triggers the next GC; the gap is GC headroom.

spec.title: Heap alloc churn
spec.description: Cumulative heap-allocation rate (includes freed); allocation churn / GC pressure.

spec.title: Live heap objects
spec.description: Number of live heap objects (a count, despite the _ratio suffix).

spec.title: Process CPU (user/system)
spec.description: CPU seconds/s by mode (~cores).

spec.title: Checkpoint persist age
spec.description: Absent when the checkpoint store is not file-backed (in-memory).

spec.title: API latency p50/p95/p99 by endpoint
spec.description: Per-endpoint API latency quantiles (exemplars enabled).

spec.title: PII filter status
spec.description: Compliance view: every category should read 'emitted' (==1) unless redacted.

spec.title: Scrape → API trace waterfall
spec.description: Trace panels are empty if tracing.enabled=false.

spec.title: API p95 by endpoint (traces)
spec.description: Trace panels are empty if tracing.enabled=false.

spec.title: Scrape cadence by collector (traces)
spec.description: Trace panels are empty if tracing.enabled=false.

spec.title: stream.receive batch size (traces)
spec.description: Trace panels are empty if tracing.enabled=false.

spec.title: Metrics over cardinality cap
spec.description: Metric families that exceeded the per-metric series cap (cardinality.metric_limit, default 10000) and are now collapsing excess series into one otel_metric_overflow series — SILENT per-series detail loss. >0 means raise metric_limit or lower flow cardinality (ephemeral source_port is the biggest driver).

spec.title: Busiest metric — % of cap
spec.description: Highest per-metric active-series count as a fraction of the 10k cap.

spec.title: Total active series
spec.description: Sum of active series across all tailscale2otel metrics (a proxy for ingest cost).

spec.title: Overflowing families
spec.description: Metric families currently over the per-metric cap (otel_metric_overflow=true).

defaults.noValue: No metrics over cap — all series fully resolved.

spec.title: Active series vs 10k cap (top $topn)
spec.description: Per-metric active series against the cap. Watch the flow families.

spec.title: Flow series: raw vs bounded rollup
spec.description: Raw flow families saturate the 10k cap; the bounded rollup stays small. When raw is at cap, trust the ROLLUP talker panels on the Network tab.

spec.title: __other__ rollup share
spec.description: Fraction of rollup bytes folded into the bounded __other__ bucket. High = many small talkers.

spec.title: Flow log records dropped/s
spec.description: Flow LOG records suppressed by the per-window volume guard (collectors.flowlogs.max_log_records_per_window). Metrics are never dropped, only logs.

spec.title: Dedup set size
spec.description: Keys held in each cross-source de-duplication set (a count).

spec.title: Dedup evictions/s
spec.description: Sustained evictions mean a dedup set is undersized.

spec.title: Series limit
spec.description: Configured per-metric series limit (cardinality.metric_limit). 0 means unlimited.

spec.title: Overflowing now
spec.description: Number of metric families currently overflowing their series cap. >0 means detail loss.

spec.title: Per-metric headroom (top-N)
spec.description: Per-metric active-series count divided by the series limit — headroom as a fraction. 1.0 = at cap. Uses / on() group_left() because the limit is a single unlabelled series.

spec.expr: topk($topn, max by (metric_name) (tailscale2otel_series_active) / on() group_left() tailscale2otel_series_limit)

spec.title: Active series by group
spec.description: Active series aggregated by metric_group — the primary cost-driver view. 18 groups live; each group maps to a logical collector domain.

spec.title: Metrics overflowing now
spec.description: Metric families where overflowing_ratio == 1 (capped). 147+ series tracked; 0 overflowing is the normal live state — that is correct.

spec.title: Ingest vs export cost (per minute)
spec.description: Export datapoints/min and log records/min (ingest cost) alongside per-source ingest rate. Rising DPM driven by a single source → check that group in 'Active series by group'.
